role: This file is the shared client-side runtime library for every DNA surface, exposing global DNA utilities for color math, theming, spacing, layout, story traversal, controls, feedback, and navigation.
capabilities: HSL conversion and lightness-based polarity inversion
warmth dial surface color generation for four page surfaces
live CSS custom-property injection for identity colors
fallback token constants for archived surfaces
story node lookup and tier-based cuts
control button rendering from application component records
dial target discovery and spacing multiplier
live spacing resolver and CSS variable injection
viewer split-ratio resolver from grammar proportions
substance_why: It implements complete, non-trivial functions for color math, warmth/polarity surface generation, CSS variable injection, API persistence, atlas UI, story cuts, spacing/role resolution, split-pane and pinch-zoom, with only a few explicitly flagged deferred areas.
interactions_present: Atlas chip button opens/closes the navigation panel
Escape key and scrim click close the Atlas panel
Atlas links navigate to surfaces, faces, and documents
Split-pane divider drag via pointer events resizes panes
Split-pane divider double-click resets to natural fraction
Split-pane programmatic toggle/reset/full APIs apply styles
Two-finger pinch-zoom touch gestures scale a target element
interactions_missing: No API error/loading UI beyond thrown errors and 'Atlas unavailable' message
No keyboard focus trap or arrow navigation inside the Atlas panel
No accessibility roles/labels on dynamically injected Atlas elements except the close button aria-label
No debouncing or requestAnimationFrame for split-pane drag/pinch-zoom updates
No cleanup of injected Atlas style and DOM elements
No validation/normalization of tokens/grammar shape before injection
Story cut silently falls back to leaves for unknown tiers
Role resolver leaves space values unresolved (pending per-relationship tuning)
No offline or localStorage-unavailable fallback beyond try/catch
performance_risks: Atlas build fetches every face version in parallel on first open
Atlas injects a large inline style block and DOM nodes synchronously
Repeated CSS variable injection loops over many properties without diffing
HSL/hex conversions and Math.pow in resolve() run on every role resolution
Pinch-zoom touchmove calls set/get and preventDefault every frame without throttling
Split-pane pointermove applies flex styles every move event without rAF
No memoization of surfaces() or space() outputs for unchanged inputs
reuse_why: The domain logic is real and reusable, but it is entangled in one IIFE with inline CSS, global namespace mutation, and mixed pure/impure concerns, so it should be modularized rather than dropped or used as-is.
decomposition_hints: Extract pure color math into a standalone module
Extract surface/warmth/polarity + injectVars into a theme engine module
Extract API client into a separate service module
Extract Atlas UI into its own component with externalized styles/template
Extract story traversal into a content-addressing module
Extract control rendering into a component factory
Extract feedback mark model into a marks/annotations module
Extract spacing/dial resolution into a spatial scale module
Extract role resolver into a registry-resolution module
Extract splitPane into a layout component
Extract pinchZoom into a gesture utility module
Separate fallback token constants from runtime code
